children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: Expected Oleksandr, but got 'Hlib'
assert 'Hlib' == 'Oleksandr'
  
  - Oleksandr
  + Hlib
Verify successful login, response time, and token validity

AssertionError: Expected to be on other user profile page, but was at: https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/ubs?tab=All%20habits
assert '/friends' in 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/ubs?tab=All%20habits'
Check that a user is redirected to another Friend page after clicking on a friend card on the 'All friends' tab on the Friend page

AssertionError: This is not main page.
assert ('greenCity' in 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/greenCity' and 'There are 728 of us and today we' in ('Нас і сьогодні ми', 'There are of us and today we'))
 +  where 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/greenCity' = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="c8d557c8cd24714f0125002acfb10c0d")>.current_url
 +  and   'There are 728 of us and today we' = <utils.custom_web_element.CustomWebElement object at 0x7fc0ba2900e0>.text
 +    where <utils.custom_web_element.CustomWebElement object at 0x7fc0ba2900e0> = <pages.common_pages.main_page.MainPage object at 0x7fc0ba46d580>.there_are
Header navigation test.
AssertionError: Expected email error 'Введіть пошту.', but got 'Email is required.'
Verify validation errors when signing in with empty fields

AssertionError: assert False
 +  where False = <bound method PlacesSavedPage.is_more_options_filter_visible of <pages.abstract_pages.saved_abstract.places_saved_page.PlacesSavedPage object at 0x7fc0ba1ed8b0>>()
 +    where <bound method PlacesSavedPage.is_more_options_filter_visible of <pages.abstract_pages.saved_abstract.places_saved_page.PlacesSavedPage object at 0x7fc0ba1ed8b0>> = <pages.abstract_pages.saved_abstract.places_saved_page.PlacesSavedPage object at 0x7fc0ba1ed8b0>.is_more_options_filter_visible
Verify filters and search controls are displayed on Saved Places page

AssertionError: This is not my space page or user name is incorrect.
assert ('profile' in 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/greenCity/profile/1205' and 'Hlib' == 'Oleksandr'
 +  where 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/greenCity/profile/1205' = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="8dfb209a8329226ee655aeef0a895d2f")>.current_url
  
  - Oleksandr
  + Hlib)
User menu check
